# The 15 Days | What Happens Each Day

<callout icon="📅" color="blue_bg">
	**THE 15 DAYS** | 30 minutes a day | One task, one post in that day's channel | All times SGT
</callout>

<callout icon="🚨" color="red_bg">
	**Two gates you cannot miss.** Day 8 (2-minute video) and Day 14 (final submission). Miss either and you drop off the graduation and competition track. You keep your agent and can still attend the Summit.
</callout>

The build arc: orientation (1), set up the brain (2 to 5), build the engine (6 to 7), prove it (Gate 1, Day 8), make it useful (9 to 11), polish (12 to 13), final (Gate 2, Day 14), graduate (15).

<table fit-page-width="true" header-row="true">
<tr color="blue_bg">
<td>Day</td>
<td>Date (SGT)</td>
<td>Title</td>
<td>Task (about 30 min)</td>
<td>Post in</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Sun Jun 21</td>
<td>Orientation</td>
<td>Join the community, create your Claude Project, say hello.</td>
<td>#Day1</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Mon Jun 22</td>
<td>Name your business</td>
<td>Name your business and product in 3 sentences in the Project. (Template 1)</td>
<td>#Day2</td>
</tr>
<tr color="orange_bg">
<td>3</td>
<td>Tue Jun 23</td>
<td>Build the Business Profile (graded)</td>
<td>Write your business profile (product, price, what makes it different). (Template 2)</td>
<td>#Day3</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Wed Jun 24</td>
<td>Teach It Your Customer</td>
<td>Add your ideal customer (who, their problem, where they hang out). (Template 3)</td>
<td>#Day4</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Thu Jun 25</td>
<td>Teach it your voice</td>
<td>Paste 2 to 3 things you have written so the agent sounds like you. (Template 4)</td>
<td>#Day5</td>
</tr>
<tr color="orange_bg">
<td>6</td>
<td>Fri Jun 26</td>
<td>Build the idea engine (graded)</td>
<td>Write the instruction that makes it research a fresh content idea. (Template 5)</td>
<td>#Day6</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>7</td>
<td>Sat Jun 27</td>
<td>First ideas</td>
<td>Run it. Generate 3 content ideas. Keep the best one.</td>
<td>#Day7</td>
</tr>
<tr color="red_bg">
<td>8</td>
<td>Sun Jun 28</td>
<td>Gate 1: The 2-Minute Video</td>
<td>A 2-minute phone video: your agent makes one idea, you say your biggest blocker.</td>
<td>#Day8</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>9</td>
<td>Mon Jun 29</td>
<td>Idea to ready-to-run prompt</td>
<td>Add the step that turns each idea into a paste-ready prompt. (Template 6)</td>
<td>#Day9</td>
</tr>
<tr color="orange_bg">
<td>10</td>
<td>Tue Jun 30</td>
<td>One Idea, Three Formats (graded)</td>
<td>Teach it to output the idea as a post, a reel script, and a caption. (Template 7)</td>
<td>#Day10</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>11</td>
<td>Wed Jul 1</td>
<td>Make it proactive</td>
<td>Set the daily routine so it hands you an idea every morning. (Template 8)</td>
<td>#Day11</td>
</tr>
<tr color="orange_bg">
<td>12</td>
<td>Thu Jul 2</td>
<td>Tighten it (graded)</td>
<td>Polish the instructions. Make every idea specific to you.</td>
<td>#Day12</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>13</td>
<td>Fri Jul 3</td>
<td>Prove it for a week</td>
<td>Run it 7 times in one sitting. Pick your favorite.</td>
<td>#Day13</td>
</tr>
<tr color="red_bg">
<td>14</td>
<td>Sat Jul 4</td>
<td>Gate 2: Final Submission</td>
<td>Submit your agent, 1-page brief, and a demo idea (3 separate boxes). The brief uses Template 9.</td>
<td>#Day14</td>
</tr>
<tr color="purple_bg">
<td>15</td>
<td>Sun Jul 5</td>
<td>Graduation</td>
<td>Post the best idea your agent gave you. Get ready for the Summit.</td>
<td>#Day15</td>
</tr>
<tr color="green_bg">
<td></td>
<td>Wed Jul 8</td>
<td>The AI Marketing Agent Summit</td>
<td>Watch 3 experts build 3 agents live. Winners announced.</td>
<td>Attend</td>
</tr>
</table>

## What Each Submission Is (so grading stays consistent)

<table fit-page-width="true" header-row="true">
<tr color="blue_bg">
<td>Submission</td>
<td>Day</td>
<td>Done means</td>
</tr>
<tr><td>1</td><td>Day 3</td><td>Business profile written into the Project</td></tr>
<tr><td>2</td><td>Day 6</td><td>First idea-engine instruction drafted</td></tr>
<tr color="red_bg"><td>3 (Gate 1)</td><td>Day 8</td><td>2-minute video posted</td></tr>
<tr><td>4</td><td>Day 10</td><td>Agent outputs an idea in 3 formats</td></tr>
<tr><td>5</td><td>Day 12</td><td>Instructions polished and business-specific</td></tr>
<tr color="red_bg"><td>6 (Gate 2)</td><td>Day 14</td><td>Final agent, brief, and demo submitted</td></tr>
</table>

<callout icon="🧰" color="gray_bg">
	**Tools members need:** a Claude account (Projects), their product details, 2 to 3 writing samples, and a phone (for the Day 8 video only). No design tools. No image tools. No code.
</callout>

---
*30 min a day, every day. Realistic outcomes only. AI SCHOOL. NAS.com. CONFIDENTIAL.*
